mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ratings (user_id, movie_id, rating, rating_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{rating}, #{ratingTime})

INSERT INTO ratings (user_id, movie_id, rating, rating_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{rating}, #{ratingTime}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, movie_id) DO UPDATE SET rating = EXCLUDED.rating, rating_time = EXCLUDED.rating_time WHERE ratings.rating IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.rating
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, movie_id, rating, rating_time FROM ratings WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rating_time DESC

SELECT r.movie_id as id, r.movie_id as movieId, m.name as movieName, m.cover as posterUrl, r.rating as rating, r.rating_time as ratingTime, m.storyline as description FROM ratings r JOIN movies m ON r.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.rating_time DESC
mapper.update: WITH rating_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS votes, AVG(rating)::numeric AS avg_rating FROM ratings WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} ), blended_calc AS ( SELECT m.movie_id, m.score AS current_score, COALESCE(rs.votes, 0) AS new_votes, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rs.votes, 0) = 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(m.douban_score, m.score, 0)::numeric, 1) WHEN m.douban_score IS NULL THEN ROUND((COALESCE(rs.avg_rating, 0) * 2)::numeric, 1) ELSE ROUND( ((#{kWeight} * m.douban_score + COALESCE(rs.votes, 0) * COALESCE(rs.avg_rating, 0) * 2.0) / (#{kWeight} + COALESCE(rs.votes, 0)))::numeric, 1 ) END AS blended_score FROM movies m CROSS JOIN rating_stats rs WHERE m.movie_id = #{movieId} ), score_calc AS ( SELECT b.movie_id, b.new_votes, CASE WHEN b.new_votes < #{forceUpdateVotesThreshold} OR b.current_score IS NULL OR ROUND(b.current_score::numeric, 1) <> b.blended_score THEN b.blended_score ELSE b.current_score END AS target_score FROM blended_calc b ) UPDATE movies m SET votes = c.new_votes, score = c.target_score FROM score_calc c WHERE m.movie_id = c.movie_id AND (m.votes IS DISTINCT FROM c.new_votes OR m.score IS DISTINCT FROM c.target_score)
